items.name: chat-box
items.title: Chat Box
items.description: Headless AI chat box with streaming support and pretext-powered text measurement. Provides a context provider, chat state hook, auto-sizing textarea hook, and keyboard handling — bring your own UI.

items.name: chat-input
items.title: Chat Input
items.description: Headless chat input with pretext-powered auto-sizing textarea. Render prop pattern provides height, line count, and keyboard handling — bring your own textarea and buttons.

items.name: chat-message
items.title: Chat Message
items.description: Headless per-message component with pretext-powered balanced text (tightest bubble width preserving line count), copy-to-clipboard, and render props.

items.name: chat-messages
items.title: Chat Messages
items.description: Virtualized message list with pretext-powered height computation, scroll management with stick-to-bottom behavior, and render props for full layout control.

items.name: transport-openai
items.title: Transport: OpenAI
items.description: ChatTransport implementation for OpenAI's chat completions API. Parses SSE text/event-stream format. Supports custom base URL and model selection.

items.name: streaming-text
items.title: Streaming Text
items.description: Animated streaming text with word-level motion. Ships with configurable presets (fade-blur, fade, slide-up, scale, none) and supports fully custom animation configs.

items.name: chat-full
items.title: Chat Full
items.description: Fully styled chat interface composing chat-box, chat-input, chat-message, and chat-messages. Reference implementation with virtualized messages, balanced text, auto-sizing input, and scroll management.
